\"The Factory Field is a field that cate: "The Factory Field is a field that caters to Electric and Steel-Type moves.
They contain a wide array of different e: They contain a wide array of different effects depending on the moves, abilities, and Pokémon.
The abilities Motor Drive and Download's: The abilities Motor Drive and Download's effects are doubled.
The effects are listed as such:: The effects are listed as such:
Technician applies on base powers up to: Technician applies on base powers up to 80.
Gear Up's effect is doubled, and additio: Gear Up's effect is doubled, and additionally boost its user.
The moves Steam Roller and Techno Blast: The moves Steam Roller and Techno Blast increase in base power by x1.2.
Flash Cannon, Gyro Ball, Gear Grind, and: Flash Cannon, Gyro Ball, Gear Grind, and Magnet Bomb increase in base power by x2.
The stat-changing effects of Metal Sound: The stat-changing effects of Metal Sound, Iron Defense, Shift Gear, and Autotomize are amplified.
Magnet Rise lasts for 8 turns. Nature Po: Magnet Rise lasts for 8 turns. Nature Power becomes Gear Grind.
Camouflage changes the user's type to St: Camouflage changes the user's type to Steel. Secret Power may reduce Attack.
And finally, Synthetic Seed boosts Sp. A: And finally, Synthetic Seed boosts Sp. Att and applies Laser Focus to the user."
\"Though this field is powerful, it isn': "Though this field is powerful, it isn't invincible.
Certain moves have the power to short ci: Certain moves have the power to short circuit the field,\c[6] disabling all electronic devices in the area.\se[expfull]
These moves are: Magnitude, Discharge, E: These moves are: Magnitude, Discharge, Explosion, Selfdestruct, Fissure, Bulldoze, Earthquake, Ion Deluge, Tectonic Rage and Gigavolt Havoc.
Discharge also has the ability to altern: Discharge also has the ability to alternate fields between Factory and Short-Circuit.
Maybe best to copy that down instead of: Maybe best to copy that down instead of carrying a book around.
A digital copy is much more convenient!: A digital copy is much more convenient!
Actually this book seems to be missing s: Actually this book seems to be missing some stuff. It's probably outdated.
Best to just check the Field Notes app. After the intial read-out, it pulls automatic updates with the newest findings!
